요한삼서 1:1.content: The elder to Gaius the beloved, whom I love in truth.

요한삼서 1:2.content: Beloved, I pray that you may prosper in all things and be healthy, even as your soul prospers.

요한삼서 1:3.content: For I rejoiced greatly when brothers came and testified about your truth, even as you walk in truth.

요한삼서 1:4.content: I have no greater joy than this: to hear about my children walking in truth.

요한삼서 1:5.content: Beloved, you do a faithful work in whatever you accomplish for those who are brothers and strangers.

요한삼서 1:6.content: They have testified about your love before the assembly. You will do well to send them forward on their journey in a way worthy of God,

요한삼서 1:7.content: because for the sake of the Name they went out, taking nothing from the Gentiles.

요한삼서 1:8.content: We therefore ought to receive such, that we may be fellow workers for the truth.

요한삼서 1:9.content: I wrote to the assembly, but Diotrephes, who loves to be first among them, doesn’t accept what we say.

요한삼서 1:10.content: Therefore if I come, I will call attention to his deeds which he does, unjustly accusing us with wicked words. Not content with this, neither does he himself receive the brothers, and those who would, he forbids and throws out of the assembly.

요한삼서 1:11.content: Beloved, don’t imitate that which is evil, but that which is good. He who does good is of God. He who does evil hasn’t seen God.

요한삼서 1:12.content: Demetrius has the testimony of all, and of the truth itself; yes, we also testify, and you know that our testimony is true.

요한삼서 1:13.content: I had many things to write to you, but I am unwilling to write to you with ink and pen;

요한삼서 1:14.content: but I hope to see you soon. Then we will speak face to face. Peace be to you. The friends greet you. Greet the friends by name.
